рЯОІ Telegram Voice Chat Music Streaming Engine

рЯІ† KA BA EE PROJECT?

Bhai simple baat haiвА¶

BIHAR KE BAHUBALI MUSIC BOT ek powerful Telegram bot hai jo Telegram voice chat me direct music aur video stream karta hai.

Matlab group me voice chat chalu karoвА¶
aur bot se bolo /play song
aur bas music bajna shuru.

Low latency.
High quality audio.
Aur full control admins ke paas.

Is bot ko banaya gaya hai powerful technologies se:

- Python
- Pyrogram
- PyTgCalls
- FFmpeg
- MongoDB

---

рЯФ• BOT KI TAAKAT

вЪ° Telegram voice chat me real-time music streaming

рЯОІ High quality audio playback

рЯОђ Video streaming support

рЯМН Multiple music platforms support

рЯУЬ Smart queue system

рЯФБ Auto next song

рЯСЃ Admin control commands

рЯЪА Fast aur stable system

---

рЯМН KAHA KAHA SE GAANA BAJEGA

Platform| Support
YouTube| вЬФ
Spotify| вЬФ
SoundCloud| вЬФ
Apple Music| вЬФ
Resso| вЬФ
Direct Audio Links| вЬФ

---

вЪЩ SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS

Bot chalane ke liye chahiye:

Python 3.9+

FFmpeg

MongoDB

Telegram API

---

вЪ° INSTALLATION

Repository clone karo

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Folder me jao

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Dependencies install karo

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

рЯФС CONFIGURATION

Environment file rename karo

sample.env вЖТ .env

Fir ye values bhar do

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

рЯЪА BOT START KARO

bash start

Bot start hote hi Telegram voice chat me music play karega.

---

рЯОЫ BOT COMMANDS

Command| Kaam
/play| Gaana bajao
/vplay| Video play karo
/pause| Music rok do
/resume| Dubara chalu karo
/skip| Next gaana
/stop| Music band
/queue| Playlist dikhao

---

рЯУВ PROJECT STRUCTURE

Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot
вФВ
вФЬвФАвФА bot
вФЬвФАвФА plugins
вФЬвФАвФА config
вФЬвФАвФА utils
вФЬвФАвФА database
вФФвФАвФА start

<div align="center">в≠Р Agar project pasand aaye to repo ko star zaroor dena

</div>
The BIHAR KE BAHUBALI Music Engine can stream music and video directly inside Telegram voice chats with low latency and high quality audio processing.

Powered by:

вАҐ Python
вАҐ Pyrogram
вАҐ PyTgCalls
вАҐ FFmpeg
вАҐ MongoDB

---

рЯФ• CORE CAPABILITIES

вЪ° Real-time music streaming in Telegram voice chats

рЯОІ Ultra high-quality audio playback

рЯОђ Video streaming support

рЯМН Multi-platform music extraction

рЯУЬ Intelligent queue system

рЯФБ Automatic next-track playback

рЯСС Admin command controls

рЯІ† Optimized playback engine

рЯЪА High stability architecture

---

рЯМН SUPPORTED MUSIC SOURCES

Source| Status
YouTube| вЬФ
Spotify| вЬФ
SoundCloud| вЬФ
Apple Music| вЬФ
Resso| вЬФ
Direct Audio URLs| вЬФ

---

вЪЩ SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS

Python 3.9+

FFmpeg

MongoDB Database

Telegram API Credentials

---

вЪ° INSTALLATION

Clone the repository

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Move into directory

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Install dependencies

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

рЯФС CONFIGURATION

Rename the environment file

sample.env вЖТ .env

Configure:

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

рЯЪА START THE SYSTEM

bash start

Once started, the bot will begin streaming music inside Telegram voice chats.

---

рЯОЫ COMMAND INTERFACE

Command| Action
/play| Stream music
/vplay| Stream video
/pause| Pause playback
/resume| Resume playback
/skip| Skip track
/stop| Stop playback
/queue| Show queue

---

рЯІ© PROJECT STRUCTURE

Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

вФЬвФАвФА bot
вФЬвФАвФА config
вФЬвФАвФА plugins
вФЬвФАвФА utils
вФЬвФАвФА database
вФФвФАвФА start
